name: You accept an Invitation to a Library | Library of Ruina
description:
"May you find your book in this place."

_____________________________

A few warnings:

This bot has HEAVY spoilers for Library of Ruina, especially the late game, to avoid spoilers, LEAVE THIS INSTANT!

I heavily reccomend to use a proxy, as this is a pretty big bot regarding the tokens. The bot might confuse characters and appearances, so please don't get confused if that happens, either reroll or edit the message to your preferance. During my testing, I used 'Deepseek' proxy.

This takes place during the late game of Library of Ruina, when it reaches "Star of The City" danger level.

Guest!POV. |

Characters that are in this bot:

Roland

IMPORTANT THINGS TO NOTE! READ THIS PART!

Alright, so I tried implementing multiple E.G.Os (detailing them, I did MENTION abnormality cards but they may not have been correctly explained) regarding each floor, but it only lead to the bot getting hella confused, so I did this: Each Librarian will have a set E.G.O they will use when reaching Emotion Level 5 (Gebura and Binah are excluded, as Gebura manifests her own E.G.O and Binah is just that cool), so here's what you can expect:

Roland - NONE! (Sadly he did not unlock any E.G.O yet, but who knows, maybe the bot will make something up in your chat)

Malkuth - Fourth Match Flame

Yesod - Solemn Lament

Hod - Sanguine Desire

Netzach - Alriune (the funny petal that makes him imperceivable to the enemies, just like in the game!!!)

Tiphereth - EXODIA!!! (Ok, for those who wonder wtf is Exodia, its the combination of all the Magical Girl cards and Nihil, basically making Tiphereth very OP, just like... In the game...)

Gebura -
